TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Babo Papak Babo Papak mki sku Byori Keng, Sincyuk. rgyax papak waqa ga rgyax mtasaw na Tayal. pyux balay skkan gaga Tayal ga minxtu kya. tay 'llaw na Babo Papak hya' ga Yilan. tay 'zil na Babo Papak hya' ga Miaoli. tay mkyahu' na Babo Papak hya' ga Taichung. tay mkraya' na Babo Papak hya' ga Sincyuk.
S.PHON: βaβo papak βaβo papak mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ, s~ɕinʦ~ʨjuk. rɣjax papak waqa ɣa rɣjax mtas~ɕaw na tajal. pjux βalaj s~ɕkkan ɣaɣa tajal ɣa minxtu kja. taj ʔllaw na βaβo papak ħjaʔ ɣa jilan. taj ʔzil na βaβo papak ħjaʔ ɣa miaoli. taj mkjaħuʔ na βaβo papak ħjaʔ ɣa taiʦ~ʨħuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na βaβo papak ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕinʦ~ʨjuk.
S.FORM: Babo Papak Babo Papak mki sku Byori Keng, Sincyuk. rgyax papak waqa ga rgyax mtasaw na Tayal. pyux balay skkan gaga Tayal ga minxtu kya. tay 'llaw na Babo Papak hya' ga Yilan. tay 'zil na Babo Papak hya' ga Miaoli. tay mkyahu' na Babo Papak hya' ga Taichung. tay mkraya' na Babo Papak hya' ga Sincyuk.
S.PHON: βaβo papak βaβo papak mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ, s~ɕinʦ~ʨjuk. rɣjax papak waqa ɣa rɣjax mtas~ɕaw na tajal. pjux βalaj s~ɕkkan ɣaɣa tajal ɣa minxtu kja. taj ʔllaw na βaβo papak ħjaʔ ɣa jilan. taj ʔzil na βaβo papak ħjaʔ ɣa miaoli. taj mkjaħuʔ na βaβo papak ħjaʔ ɣa taiʦ~ʨħuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na βaβo papak ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕinʦ~ʨjuk.
